description: Dashboard for AWS MSK cluster monitoring using Kafka JMX and node exporter metrics, covering broker health, traffic, request latency, partitions, consumers, and infrastructure.
title: AWS MSK Cluster Monitoring

cluster_name.name: cluster_name
cluster_name.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT JSONExtractString(labels, 'cluster_name')
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name='kafka_server_brokertopicmetrics_bytesin_total'
AND JSONExtractString(labels, 'cluster_name') != ''
AND fingerprint GLOBAL IN
(
  SELECT DISTINCT fingerprint FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4
  WHERE metric_name='kafka_server_brokertopicmetrics_bytesin_total'
  AND unix_milli > toUnixTimestamp(now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) * 1000
)

broker_id.name: broker_id
broker_id.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT JSONExtractString(labels, 'instance')
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name='kafka_server_replicamanager_underreplicatedpartitions'
AND JSONExtractString(labels, 'cluster_name')={{.cluster_name}}
AND JSONExtractString(labels, 'instance') != ''
AND fingerprint GLOBAL IN
(
  SELECT DISTINCT fingerprint FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4
  WHERE metric_name='kafka_server_replicamanager_underreplicatedpartitions'
  AND unix_milli > toUnixTimestamp(now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) * 1000
)

topic.name: topic
topic.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT JSONExtractString(labels, 'topic')
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name='kafka_server_brokertopicmetrics_bytesin_total'
AND JSONExtractString(labels, 'cluster_name')={{.cluster_name}}
AND JSONExtractString(labels, 'topic') != ''
AND fingerprint GLOBAL IN
(
  SELECT DISTINCT fingerprint FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4
  WHERE metric_name='kafka_server_brokertopicmetrics_bytesin_total'
  AND unix_milli > toUnixTimestamp(now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) * 1000
)

consumer_group.name: consumer_group
consumer_group.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT JSONExtractString(labels, 'consumergroup')
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name='kafka_consumergroup_current_offset'
AND JSONExtractString(labels, 'cluster_name')={{.cluster_name}}
AND JSONExtractString(labels, 'consumergroup') != ''
AND fingerprint GLOBAL IN
(
  SELECT DISTINCT fingerprint FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4
  WHERE metric_name='kafka_consumergroup_current_offset'
  AND unix_milli > toUnixTimestamp(now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) * 1000
)

widgets.description: Cluster-wide active Kafka controller count.
widgets.title: Active Controller Count

filter.expression: cluster_name = $cluster_name

widgets.description: Offline partitions reported across the selected MSK cluster.
widgets.title: Offline Partitions

filter.expression: cluster_name = $cluster_name

widgets.description: Current under-replicated partitions across the cluster.
widgets.title: Under-Replicated Partitions

filter.expression: cluster_name = $cluster_name

widgets.description: Count of brokers currently exposing replica manager metrics.
widgets.title: Broker Count

filter.expression: cluster_name = $cluster_name

widgets.description: Inbound traffic rate grouped by Kafka topic.
widgets.title: Bytes In Rate by Topic

filter.expression: cluster_name = $cluster_name AND instance in $broker_id AND topic in $topic

widgets.description: Outbound traffic rate grouped by Kafka topic.
widgets.title: Bytes Out Rate by Topic

filter.expression: cluster_name = $cluster_name AND instance in $broker_id AND topic in $topic

widgets.title: Messages In Rate

filter.expression: cluster_name = $cluster_name AND instance in $broker_id AND topic in $topic

widgets.description: Produce request rate grouped by topic.
widgets.title: Total Produce Requests

filter.expression: cluster_name = $cluster_name AND instance in $broker_id AND topic in $topic

widgets.description: Fetch request rate grouped by topic.
widgets.title: Total Fetch Requests

filter.expression: cluster_name = $cluster_name AND instance in $broker_id AND topic in $topic

widgets.description: P99 produce latency for the selected cluster and brokers.
widgets.title: P99 Produce Latency

filter.expression: cluster_name = $cluster_name AND instance in $broker_id AND request = 'Produce' AND quantile = '0.99'

widgets.description: P99 fetch latency for the selected cluster and brokers.
widgets.title: P99 Fetch Latency

filter.expression: cluster_name = $cluster_name AND instance in $broker_id AND request = 'Fetch' AND quantile = '0.99'

widgets.description: P99 latency for consumer-group-related requests.
widgets.title: P99 Consumer Group Latency

filter.expression: cluster_name = $cluster_name AND instance in $broker_id AND request LIKE '%Group%' AND quantile = '0.99'

widgets.description: Total partitions across the selected cluster and topic scope.
widgets.title: Total Partitions

filter.expression: cluster_name = $cluster_name AND topic in $topic

widgets.description: Under-replicated partitions summed by topic over time.
widgets.title: Under-Replicated Partitions Over Time

filter.expression: cluster_name = $cluster_name AND topic in $topic

widgets.description: Partitions operating below the minimum ISR.
widgets.title: Under Min ISR

filter.expression: cluster_name = $cluster_name AND topic in $topic

widgets.description: Maximum replica fetcher lag by broker over time.
widgets.title: Max Replication Lag

filter.expression: cluster_name = $cluster_name AND instance in $broker_id

widgets.description: Difference between topic partition offsets and consumer group offsets.
widgets.title: Consumer Group Lag

filter.expression: cluster_name = $cluster_name AND topic in $topic
cluster_name = $cluster_name AND topic in $topic AND consumergroup in $consumer_group

widgets.description: Current consumer offsets grouped by consumer group.
widgets.title: Consumer Current Offset by Group

filter.expression: cluster_name = $cluster_name AND topic in $topic AND consumergroup in $consumer_group

widgets.description: Failed produce request rate grouped by topic.
widgets.title: Failed Produce Requests

filter.expression: cluster_name = $cluster_name AND instance in $broker_id AND topic in $topic

widgets.description: CPU utilization derived from idle CPU seconds.
widgets.title: CPU Usage by Broker

filter.expression: cluster_name = $cluster_name AND instance in $broker_id AND mode = 'idle'

widgets.description: Used memory derived from total minus available memory.
widgets.title: Memory Usage by Broker

filter.expression: cluster_name = $cluster_name AND instance in $broker_id
cluster_name = $cluster_name AND instance in $broker_id

widgets.description: Per-broker disk throughput aggregated across devices.
widgets.title: Disk Read/Write by Broker

filter.expression: cluster_name = $cluster_name AND instance in $broker_id AND device != ''
cluster_name = $cluster_name AND instance in $broker_id AND device != ''

widgets.description: Per-broker network ingress and egress, excluding loopback.
widgets.title: Network I/O by Broker

filter.expression: cluster_name = $cluster_name AND instance in $broker_id AND device != 'lo'
cluster_name = $cluster_name AND instance in $broker_id AND device != 'lo'

widgets.description: Used disk space on the root filesystem by broker.
widgets.title: Disk Usage by Broker

filter.expression: cluster_name = $cluster_name AND instance in $broker_id AND mountpoint = '/' AND fstype != 'tmpfs' AND fstype != ''
cluster_name = $cluster_name AND instance in $broker_id AND mountpoint = '/' AND fstype != 'tmpfs' AND fstype != ''
